options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -array
options.description: return the macro array name

options.name: -avoid_abut_macro_edge_with_pins
options.description: return if avoid to abut the macro edges with pins

options.name: -cell
options.description: return the cell which will be set cell_obs

options.name: -cell_obs
options.description: return the cell obs value

options.name: -forbidden_space_to_core
options.description: return the forbidden space to core value

options.name: -forbidden_space_to_macro
options.description: return the fobidden space to macro value

options.name: -halo_sharing
options.description: return the halo sharing mode

options.name: -honor_strict_spacing_constraint
options.description: return the spacing mode

options.name: -horizontal_stacking
options.description: return the horizontal stacking constraint

options.name: -inst
options.description: return the macro which will be set the orientation constraints

options.name: -macro_corner_keepout
options.description: return the macro corner keepout value

options.name: -max_io_pin_group_keep_out
options.description: return the max height and (optionally) side extension of IO pins blockages

options.name: -min_space_to_core
options.description: return the minimum space to core value

options.name: -min_space_to_macro
options.description: return the minimum space to macro value

options.name: -non_default
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings

options.name: -orientation
options.description: return the valid orientations

options.name: -parallel_run_length
options.description: return the parallel run length value

options.name: -parallel_run_length_for_stacking
options.description: return the stacking parallel run length value

options.name: -pg_resource_model
options.description: return the pg resource model

options.name: -power_domain_as_core
options.description: return the power domain as core mode

options.name: -same_length_site
options.description: return the same length site number

options.name: -track_adjustment
options.description: return the track adjustment value

options.name: -vertical_stacking
options.description: return the vertical stacking constraint
